feature_goal: Make WakeTask category-leading for task-based alarms by wiring obvious task selection, real dismiss-blocking missions, loud configurable alarms, and completion/share moments.
target_audience: Heavy sleepers and consumer iPhone users who need forced engagement to wake up reliably
acceptance_criteria: Alarm setup includes an obvious mission/task picker.
Each saved alarm persists its configured mission and sound behavior.
The live alarm challenge blocks dismiss until the mission succeeds.
The alarm sound configuration supports loud, ramping, and randomized options where platform constraints allow.
Completion shows streak/reward feedback and an optional shareable result.
The branch builds locally or in GitHub Actions and emits durable CI evidence.
Screenshots, research, specs, logs, eval results, and postmortem artifacts are captured.
non_goals: No full accountability-friend implementation in this pass.
